title: Build Notification System
description: Create a notification system for agent events: completions, errors, mentions, dependency unblocked. Support both in-app toast notifications and OS native notifications. Notification center panel shows history. User preferences for which events trigger notifications.
acceptance_criteria: Toast notifications appear bottom-right with slide-in animation
Toasts auto-dismiss after 5s with progress indicator
Click toast navigates to relevant ticket or agent
OS notifications via Tauri notification plugin when app backgrounded
Notification bell badge shows unread count
Click bell opens notification center panel
Center shows scrollable history with mark-as-read
Settings page allows toggling notifications per event type
agent_output: Notification toast system with NotificationProvider context, useNotify hook, and 5 notification types (success, error, warning, info, meeseeks).
